entities.name: SPILLOVER IMPACTS
entities.description: The indirect effects of agricultural research that benefit areas or commodities beyond the original target

entities.name: RESEARCH POLICY FORMULATION
entities.description: The process of creating policies to guide agricultural research

entities.name: ACROSS-LOCATION SPILLOVER
entities.description: Spillover where technology for one crop at one location is adopted at other locations

entities.name: ACROSS-COMMODITY SPILLOVER
entities.description: Spillover where technology developed for one commodity is applicable to others

entities.name: PRICE SPILLOVER EFFECTS
entities.description: Indirect effects where technological change increases supply and changes prices at other locations via trade

entities.name: TECHNOLOGY
entities.description: The application of scientific knowledge for practical purposes in agriculture

entities.name: PRODUCTION EFFICIENCY
entities.description: The ability to produce maximum output with minimum input

entities.name: SUBJECTIVE ESTIMATES
entities.description: Measurement techniques based on value judgments and expert elicitation

entities.name: OBJECTIVE ESTIMATES
entities.description: Measurement techniques based on hard data and evidence of technology applicability

entities.name: ECONOMIC SURPLUS MODELS
entities.description: Models used to quantify across-location spillover impacts

entities.name: GERMPLASM RESEARCH
entities.description: Research focused on the genetic resources of crops

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics

entities.name: RESEARCH EVALUATION
entities.description: The process of assessing the impact and effectiveness of research

entities.name: POLICY PLANNING
entities.description: The process of planning future research and development policies
